story.iWant: to view my current theme summary via `/theme`
story.soThat: I can see what brand settings are in use without opening the raw theme.json file

tasks.task: Implement Theme Loader Module - check existence, read/parse theme.json, validate structure, return ThemeJson or error
Implement Theme Formatter Module - extract and format metadata, colors, typography, shapes, layouts sections
Implement Terminal Output Formatting - section headers, decorative lines, indentation, footer
Implement ANSI Color Swatch Generation - hex to ANSI conversion, graceful fallback
Implement Status Logger - update status.yaml with theme view action and history
Create Theme Workflow Files - workflow.yaml and instructions.md with phases
Testing - verify all sections display, ANSI fallback, error handling

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Given a theme.json exists, when the user runs `/theme`, then the system displays a human-readable summary
The summary includes theme name and version
The summary includes creation date and sources
The summary includes primary, secondary, and accent colors (with swatches if terminal supports ANSI)
The summary includes font families (heading, body, mono)
The summary includes shape styles (corner radius, shadow style)
The summary includes list of available layout templates
The output is formatted for terminal readability with clear sections
The path to full theme.json is displayed for power users
Given no theme exists, when the user runs `/theme`, then error message directs them to run `/setup`

doc.title: Epic 6 Technical Specification
doc.section: Story 6.1: Theme Summary View, Services and Modules, Workflows and Sequencing
doc.snippet: Defines Theme Loader and Theme Formatter modules, /theme workflow phases, and theme summary display format with ANSI color swatches.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: status.yaml tracks mode, last_action, history with ISO 8601 timestamps. Theme stored at .slide-builder/theme.json.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: User story and acceptance criteria for viewing current theme via /theme command.

file.reason: Existing workflow configuration - needs enhancement to match tech spec requirements
Basic implementation exists - needs update for full display format with ANSI colors, all sections per tech spec
Current theme data to be displayed - has Amperity brand with colors, typography, shapes, components, slides sections
State file to update with "Theme viewed via /theme" action in history array
Existing command registration - invokes theme workflow
Reference for workflow.yaml structure pattern established in Epic 5
Reference for instructions.md structure and status.yaml update pattern

node.package: HTML to image conversion for export

dependencies.note: Epic 6 does not require npm dependencies - all operations use Claude Code built-in capabilities

constraints.constraint: Theme MUST be at .slide-builder/theme.json as the active theme location
status.yaml history MUST log theme view actions with ISO 8601 timestamps
Display path to full theme.json for power users who want direct access
ANSI color codes should gracefully fall back if terminal doesn't support
Theme load should complete in under 100ms (local file, simple JSON parse)
Theme display should complete in under 500ms (local processing, format + ANSI codes)
Follow BMAD workflow pattern: workflow.yaml + instructions.md structure

interface.name: Theme Loader
interface.signature: Input: - path: string (default: ".slide-builder/theme.json") Output: - theme: ThemeJson | null - error: string | null

interface.name: Theme Formatter
interface.signature: Input: - theme: ThemeJson - useAnsiColors: boolean (default: true) Output: - formatted: string (terminal-ready display)

interface.name: status.yaml history entry
interface.signature: history: - action: "Theme viewed via /theme" timestamp: "ISO8601 format"

tests.standards: Per Epic 6 Tech Spec: Manual verification of theme display output. Test all sections displayed, ANSI color swatches (with fallback), error handling for missing theme. All tests are manual - no automated test framework required.

locations.location: Manual testing via /sb:theme command in Claude Code
Frontend Test Gate checklist in story file

ideas.idea: Run /theme with valid theme.json, verify human-readable summary displayed
Check header shows theme name and version from meta section
Check created date and sources displayed from meta.extractedFrom
Check colors section shows primary (#CCFF00), secondary (#5DBAB6), accent (#FF6B6B) with ANSI swatches
Check typography lists heading (Outfit), body (Outfit), mono (SF Mono) fonts
Check shapes section shows borderRadius and shadow styles
Check layouts section lists available templates (title, content, split, data)
Verify output has clear section separators and indentation
Delete theme.json temporarily, run /theme, verify error message guides to /setup
Verify status.yaml updated with "Theme viewed via /theme" in history array
